textPlain: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OM7mdKy3opoIf someone like me wanted to see a playthrough. What a trip down memory lane. Still remember having Mr Bean's Holiday on my clickwheel iPod and watching it every time my parents took me somewhere to the point I remembered all the dialogues.Good times.
Reminds of those games Archos (Gmini or AV?) devices had decades ago. Some of them were quite neat.
